playbook.intent: Run a recurring rotation that ships 4–6 small products per year, keeps 2–3 alive based on traction, sunsets the rest, and compounds the surviving ones into a portfolio that reaches ramen profitability.
playbook.scope: Run a recurring rotation that ships 4–6 small products per year, keeps 2–3 alive based on traction, sunsets the rest, and compounds the surviving ones into a portfolio that reaches ramen profitability.

success-criteria.criterion: Final stage decision-gate is met and committed in writing
Every stage produces its named outputs
Cycle closes only when a written commitment exists for the next step

stage.name: Portfolio scorecard
stage.intent: See every bet on one page.

tasks.task: List every shipped product with revenue + load
Score each on traction, founder energy, and growth potential
Tag each: grow / maintain / sunset / new

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when every product has a tag.

stage.name: Maintain-mode SOPs

tasks.task: Define maintain-mode (uptime, support SLA, no new features)

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when each survivor has <=1 hour/week of human load.

stage.name: Idea pipeline refill

tasks.task: Score candidates by founder-fit + market signal

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when pipeline has >=5 named candidates.

stage.name: Tiny-bet ship cadence
stage.intent: Ship a new MVP every 6-8 weeks.
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when shipped within cadence window.

stage.name: Traction read at kill date
stage.intent: Honest cull at the predetermined date.

tasks.task: Read traction metrics at the kill date

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when call is made on schedule (no extensions).

stage.name: Sunset clean
stage.intent: Close down losers without lingering cost.
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when zero recurring cost remains for the killed product.

stage.name: Reinvest in survivors
stage.intent: Compound winners with the freed capacity.

tasks.task: Pour 1 cycle into its growth lever

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when survivor lift is measurable.

stage.name: Quarterly portfolio review

tasks.task: Walk the scorecard with an outsider mindset

stage.decision-gate: Cycle closes when next-quarter plan is committed.

stage.name: Annual portfolio reset
stage.intent: Once a year, ask the brutal questions.

tasks.task: Decide which products to keep into next year

stage.decision-gate: Cycle closes when thesis is committed for the new year.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content multi-product-portfolio-rotation-ship-n-small-bets-per-year --format md, agent: faion get-content multi-product-portfolio-rotation-ship-n-small-bets-per-year --format context, json: faion get-content multi-product-portfolio-rotation-ship-n-small-bets-per-year --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial v2 draft generated from F-059..063 backlog}]
